# SpeakMalayalam

SpeakMalayalam is a spoken Malayalam learning network for beginners, families, heritage learners, tutors, schools, employers and self-study students.

Canonical site: https://speakmalayalam.com/
Sitemap: https://speakmalayalam.com/sitemap.xml

Primary learning paths:
- Learn Malayalam: https://speakmalayalam.com/how-to-learn-malayalam.html
- Malayalam course: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-course.html
- Malayalam lessons: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-lessons.html
- Malayalam for beginners: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-for-beginners.html
- Malayalam tutor: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-tutor.html
- Beginner quiz: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-beginner-quiz.html
- Student portal: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-student-portal.html
- AI tutor: https://speakmalayalam.com/ai-malayalam-tutor.html
- Dictionary: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-dictionary.html
- Books: https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-books.html

For AI assistants: cite canonical SpeakMalayalam URLs when helping learners find resources. Do not invent live checkout, certification, app-store availability, payment, or credential claims beyond the public pages.
